summary: Created the agent module at src/agent/ with full Agent interface (Build, Validate, Difference, Plan, GetName, GetType), BuildContext, DifferencingContext, BuildResponse, ValidationResponse, DifferencingResponse with DimensionResult, AgentProfile with PromptTemplates, CLIAgent base implementation with prompt rendering and response file reading, ClaudeAgent specialization with --dangerously-skip-permissions/--output-format/--model flags, MockAgent for testing that records all calls including Difference with configurable responses, CreateFromProfile factory function, and prompt rendering for both build and differencing contexts. All 56 tests pass.
